semantic_text:
Don't require to be logged in to retrieve templates (#19196)

Don't attempt to retrieve organization level templates when we are not
logged in.

Fixes https://github.com/pulumi/pulumi/issues/19073
Fixes https://github.com/pulumi/pulumi/issues/19180

feat: update github actions setup (#1516)

* feat: update actions setup

- bump mariadb to be in sync with the latest setup on prod to 10.11.11
- update all actions/checkout to v4
- update the state action to v9 (latest stable)
- Also, implement a cocurrency check to cancel in progress CI runs when
a new commit is pushed to cancel the old run.
- add timeout to prevent hung jobs
fix prev

chore: bump github.com/docker/cli from 28.0.4+incompatible to 28.1.1+incompatible (#1029)

Signed-off-by: dependabot[bot] <support@github.com>
Co-authored-by: dependabot[bot] <49699333+dependabot[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

This PR is related to issue #1594 
As mentioned in comment
1. Add a before_action in ApplicationController to delete any cookies
that are not explicitly used by Lobsters. This includes all cookies
except the tag filter cookie and the Rails session cookie.

2. Also, replace the ineffective `clear_lobster_trap` method with a new
method `clear_session_cookie`, which correctly clears the session
cookie when the session is empty (e.g., after logout or for anonymous
visitors).
fix: add missing a tag in story comments page

improve ansible_host in proxmox inventory plugin (#9952)

* improve ansible_host in proxmox inventory plugin

I had this issue myself and found out there was already an issue thread:

https://github.com/ansible-collections/community.general/issues/5906

this fixes the issue for hope we can all benefit after this gets merged
